column1: Outer bands of Debby now moving into our area. Winds could easily gust over 40 mph as these stronger bands move onshore. We're watching for isolated tornadoes today as well, and there's already a tornado warning in Collier Co down to our south. We'll keep you posted all day.
Feeling it right now as I sit on my porch in Ellenton. Wind picked up, then passed, can hear the rain coming.
thanks for posting Kathy. We were concerned about a possible tornado. Hope everyone is well in Ridgewood.

we are okay, I don't sleep well normally so I am kind of use to it, rain, wind bands all night. Seems to have slowed but power flicking on & off is always worrisome, as are tornado warnings. It is 7:30 am seems to be quieting down.
We both had two text alerts and a phone calls from the collier county for the immediate area. She hid in the bathroom while I took a video outside. That was the area of concern.
As always, THE only one to watch for calm forecasting without hype , here in the Tampa area.
Will I be able to mow my lawn at 10:07? Will there be a band in Wesley Chapel? (Sorry, everyone makes that joke but I couldn’t resist)
the time to mow was yesterday! lol just sit back and watch the lawn grow now man. Nothing else can be done 🤣
Im within a mile from the gulf in new port Richey, this will be a good test run for the start of the season.
how’s the flooding normally in new port richey? We are staying at a air bnb
we definitely flood out this way but it also depends what area of NPR. Some areas are high and dry.
We live right by the Cotee River, this is our first hurricane season living in this part of new port Richey so wondering the same!😅
me too but a quarter mile from AMI .... Yep I'm gonna use this one to stress less for what's to come later. Hopefully anyways....
Stay safe! ☺️
we will. We have voluntary evac.... We are on 2nd level here so we are staying. If it changes to mandatory, my kids and dogs ,and I are out of here as we always do ....
you as well 😁
And not as bad as first talked about days ago
That’s a long tail coming our way
I am here in collier county and its over now but heavy rain with wind, stay safe everyone!
Thank you . I am in Maine and have a place on the water in Tampa , your update s are so appreciated 😎
And just 3 days ago this storm was going up east coast.
thats Florida
this is a great local level-headed weather resource to follow 😀
Thank you . I'm at the airport in Sarasota Bradenton to south bend
Thanks Denis Phillips for always looking out for us.👍👍💙💙
Thank you for the continuous updates! You are appreciated more than you know!
Thanks Denis. You always give me co fence and security with your updates.
The dog was just begging to go outside here in Fort Myers... he is NOT impressed. He peed under the carport and came running back in soaking wet. 🤣
Keeping us honestly informed. Thank you. Stay safe

I’ve been watching my storm radar app this morning and it seems to be slowing down in that warm water like you thought it might last night on your live.
Be safe all of you, from all your followers on the East coast 🙏🙏🙏
Brooksville here, sun is shinning right now….How quickly it’s gonna change tho!! Stay safe and dry everyone!!

the heavy rain wont though

I’m good. Just taking it easy and drinking my coffee ❤️
still trying to wake up. Need my Pepsi & then need to wash some dishes. 🙄😂
Happy Sunday Denis - thank you for your consistent knowledge for helping to calm our anxiety over the years thru all our storm /hurricane seasons 👏🏻☔️🌪️🌀⛈️🌊 - Palm Harbor is calm so far 👍🏻🙏
Yup! Tornado Warnings on phones went off a little while ago down here in Collier… heavy rains right now… Off and On.

Loved last nite, Denis was on tv n on fb, at the same time
best description I heard: "This is a rainmaker with some wind. That's it."
Really not excited about flying into Tampa International Airport tonight. Supposed to land around 7pm local time. Already a nervous flyer! 💆🏾‍♂️
have a few drinks on the flight, you’ll be alright.
will definitely be having a few 😂👌🏾
eek - well youll know - if its bad they probably will delay your flight from where you are leaving from
I think if the weather gets too bad, they’d have to divert us. We're about to board in London, so if they stop accepting flights, we'll likely already be in the air.

makes sense at the time you to land theres an 80 percent chance of thunderstorms rain and thats around the time the wind is slowing down right before that its about 30mph--- im on weather.com- for the bayshore gardens area which is right near the airport in Sarasota about 2-3 mile circumfrance maybe theyll fly you into there instead? The report for Tampa is the exact same thing right now as well i just checked---- anything can shift in the next 7 -10 hours- praying this thing out is also a goof plan lol be safe---- a very reliable source for pretty accurate weather is Denis Phillips - he is on facebook and is out of the bay area --- really awesome reports every few hours!
just got word incoming no out going but incoming flights into tampa are being either refirected, diverted and or cancelled
yeah, we made it to Tampa and hovered over for about 40 mins before they finally sent us to Orlando.
ok be safe dint take any risks many places have been flooded and it plans to flood into wed safe travels nice to meet you take care and may God keep you and your family!!!
Thanks wish they would just keep you on air. I think you’re our security blanket’ xo

Did you check the battery in the thermostat?
